LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE & MOTION TO DISMISS IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD VIOLATION OF SOME MANDATORY DUTY AS TO WHICH HE HAS EXHAUSTED HIS ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE & MOTION TO DISMISS IS CONTINUED FROM OCT-02-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION OCT-29-2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY.

LAW AND MOTION 301, RESPONDENT STATE BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE & MOTION TO DISMISS IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF HAS PLEADED A TOTAL FAILURE TO RESPOND IN VIOLATION OF AN EXPRESS STATUTORY DUTY TO RESPOND AND EXPLAIN. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

NOTICE OF HEARING; DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE & MOTION TO DISMISS; MEMORANDUM OF P/A, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING HEARING SET FOR OCT-02-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED VERIFIED PETITOIN FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AND/OR PROHIBITION AND COMPLAINT FOR INJUNCTION AND DECLARATORY RELIEF FILED BY RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING
LAW AND MOTION 302, NOTCIE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE CONTINUED FROM FEB-10-2012 TO LAW AND MOTION AT MAR-02-2012, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, PER PARTIES STIPULATION E-MAIL TO THE COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER THOMAS HAGGERTY'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH ITS MINISTERIAL DUTIES UNDER CIVIL CODE 1798.35(B). THE DECEMBER 1, 2011, LETTER DOES NOT RENDER THIS CASE MOOT BECAUSE THAT LETTER DOES NOT PROVIDE ALL OF THE INFORMATION THAT THE STATUTE REQUIRES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED. = (302/HEK)
ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE

calendar.matters:
Notcie Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALBERT J. GARCIA, TEL. NO. (510) 848-5190 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. LESLIE E. BRAST, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-5548 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THOMAS HAGGERTY'S Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate IS Granted. Respondent failed to comply with its ministerial duties under Civil Code 1798.35(b). The December 1, 2011, letter does not render this case moot because that letter does not provide all of the information that the statute requires. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Not reported. = (302/HEK)
